title: Platter Dropper Game
description: An arcade puzzle simulator bridging falling block physics with real-time colometric sorting criteria. Built entirely inside native frontend browser layers, the platform generates a continuous influx of colored geometric tiles cascading down an indexed grid column. The engine issues dynamic, sorting sorting instructions ('Clear all Warm Colors', 'Tap only Cool Tones'), parsing click interactions down to hexadecimal wavelength classifications to trigger line cleanses, structural cascades, and persistent score accumulations.
